Short Description: User received an email pretending to be a supplier asking to change bank details.
Initial Containment Actions: User did not click link; email blocked for other users.
Root Cause (once known): Phishing attempt targeting finance users; caught early.
Notifications (Internal/External): Finance manager and IT informed; no external notifications needed.
Lessons Learned: Reinforce supplier verification procedures; include example in next awareness session.
Follow-up Actions: Add explicit step in AP process to verify bank changes via trusted channel.
